params.name: retomada-market-parity-commit-chain
params.description: Planejamento arquitetural PREVC para retomada M1-M3 com commit chains atômicas e gates obrigatórios.

params.title: Retomada Estratégica M1-M3 (Commit Chains)
params.summary: Plano de implementação sem código para M1/M2/M3 com gates, checkpoints e stop conditions alinhados ao RFC-0011 e EXECUTION-SEQUENCE.

params.title: Resolver tensão GD-02 sem alterar runtime
params.description: RFC-0011 mantém subject planejado aggregation.* (GD-02), mas o validator runtime aceita apenas roots marketdata|insights|quarantine. Decisão: congelar runtime roots atuais e tratar qualquer expansão d...
alternatives: Expandir roots no runtime imediatamente
Ignorar GD-02 e prosseguir com runtime+contracts no mesmo commit

params.title: Baseline de gates para cadeia de commits
params.description: Estado real em 2026-02-13: make docs-check falha por dívida estrutural de headers ADR/RFC legados; make invariants-check passa; check-truth-map e feature-pack guards passam. Decisão: manter docs-check...
alternatives: Remover docs-check da cadeia
Permitir bypass de docs-check até fim de M3

params.title: Checkpoint CP-M1
params.description: Checkpoint obrigatório após M1.C3 (writer-port runtime) e após M1.C5 (test/replay). Critério: gates always + replay golden verdes antes de avançar para M2.
alternatives: Avançar para M2 sem checkpoint intermediário
Executar checkpoint apenas no final de M1

params.title: Checkpoint CP-M2
params.description: Checkpoint obrigatório após M2.C3 (runtime backpressure) e após M2.C4 (test/replay). Critério: race + cobertura de slow-client/getrange determinístico.
alternatives: Executar somente teste curto
Pular race nesta fase

params.title: Checkpoint CP-M3
params.description: Checkpoint obrigatório após M3.C3 (writers heatmap/vp) e após M3.C4 (replay rebuild). Critério: replay hash-equivalence + soak em cardinalidade alta.
alternatives: Rodar soak só no fim do programa
Validar apenas unitários sem golden

params.title: Commit Chain Policy
params.description: Política adotada: 1 commit = 1 motivo arquitetural, reversível isoladamente, sem misturar docs/** com .context/**, sem misturar runtime com contracts, e sem juntar storage writer com replay logic.
alternatives: Commits grandes por milestone
Misturar docs e runtime no mesmo commit

params.title: Canonical bus taxonomy in machine-readable registry
params.description: Adopt a single YAML registry at docs/contracts/subject-registry.yaml as source of truth for event-bus subjects, with canonical format {event}.v{version}.{venue}.{instrument} and explicit status values...

params.title: Storage bounded context is consumer-only for domain subjects
params.description: Storage feature-pack was corrected to not emit insights or aggregation subjects. Storage consumes and persists; domain subject emission remains with aggregation/insights/marketdata producers.
alternatives: Allow storage to emit insights.crossvenue.* runtime subjects
Keep ambiguous output declarations in storage pack

params.title: Resolve TBD subjects with explicit planned names
params.description: Replaced placeholder/TBD subjects in heatmap, volume-profiles, and liquidations-markprice packs with explicit planned subjects to enable future CI validation and avoid naming drift.
alternatives: Keep placeholders until implementation starts
Create per-pack temporary aliases

params.title: Instrument vs symbol divergence handling
params.description: Registry enforces instrument token for event-bus subjects while WS docs keep symbol as delivery representation, with explicit naming note to prevent cross-layer confusion.
alternatives: Force symbol token everywhere
Force instrument token in WS path contracts
